name: Sally Lunn
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together the milk, whole egg, butter, and salt until well combined.
2. Gradually add in the sugar and mix until smooth.
3. Sift in the bread flour and stir until just combined.
4. Cover the dough and let it rest for 30 minutes.
5. Preheat the oven to a low temperature (around 300°F or 150°C).
6. Shape the dough into rounds and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, about 20-25 minutes.
8. Turn off the heat and let cool on a wire rack before serving.
